name: Reactive ATP algorithm for AT/AF reduction
description: A proprietary algorithm in the Azure MRI SureScan pacemaker designed to reduce the risk and duration of atrial tachyarrhythmia (AT) and atrial fibrillation (AF) episodes. Demonstrates a 36% relative reduction in AT/AF episodes lasting more than 7 days, with effectiveness bounded by patient population and episode duration criteria from clinical studies.
